summary: This document contains a raw conversation log between an AI health agent and a user named Cristina during a testing phase. The AI attempts to triage stomach pain symptoms, asking for medical history and medication details, while the user provides fragmented responses. It highlights the current capabilities and interaction patterns of the KeepMeCompany AI agent.
